name: Florida Cars
description_short: South Florida used car dealership in Medley (Miami-Dade) offering vehicle sales, inspections, repairs, and flexible financing including for credit-rebuilding buyers.
description_long:
Florida Cars is a used car dealership operating in Medley, Florida, within the greater Miami-Dade area. The business serves the South Florida market with a focus on pre-owned vehicle sales alongside in-house repair and inspection services. No founding year was confirmed in available records, and the business does not carry verified BBB accreditation or ratings. It is worth noting that several unrelated businesses operate under the 'Florida Cars' name across the state, including entities in Fort Wayne (Indiana), Orlando, West Palm Beach, and Miami — consumers should confirm they are engaging with the correct location.

The dealership's inventory spans sedans, SUVs, and trucks. Beyond vehicle sales, Florida Cars offers on-site mechanical services including oil changes, brake service, engine diagnostics, and suspension checks. Vehicle inspections covering brakes, fluids, tires, and suspension are available, which can be useful for buyers seeking pre-purchase evaluations. Notably, the dealership markets flexible financing options, explicitly including customers who are rebuilding their credit — making it one of the services that positions it within the consumer finance space for CreditDoc's audience.

The Google Maps profile for this Miami-area location shows a 5.0-star rating across 67 reviews, indicating strong customer satisfaction at the local level. The full-service model — combining sales, financing, inspections, and repairs under one roof — differentiates it from dealerships focused purely on transactions. Specific financing terms, APR ranges, and lender partnerships are not disclosed publicly on the website, which limits upfront comparison shopping.

For consumers with challenged credit histories seeking vehicle financing in South Florida, Florida Cars represents a locally reviewed option worth considering. However, the lack of transparent financing terms, no verified BBB standing, and the name confusion with multiple 'Florida Cars' entities across Florida are real limitations. Buyers should confirm the specific Medley, FL location and request full financing disclosures before committing.
pros: 5.0/5 Google rating from 67 reviews — exceptionally high local customer satisfaction
Explicitly offers financing for customers actively rebuilding credit
Full-service facility: sales, inspections, mechanical repairs, and financing in one location
Located in Medley (Miami-Dade), serving the broad South Florida metro market
Vehicle inspections available covering brakes, fluids, tires, and suspension
No listed setup fees for financing products
cons: Financing terms, APR ranges, and lender details not disclosed on the website
No verified BBB rating or accreditation found
Multiple unrelated businesses share the 'Florida Cars' name statewide, creating confusion
No mobile app or robust online portal identified
Limited to in-person transactions at the Medley, FL location — no remote/national service
best_for: South Florida residents with bad or rebuilding credit seeking auto financing
Miami-Dade area buyers wanting a single location for purchase, inspection, and repair
Consumers who prefer working with a high-rated local dealer over large franchise lots
diagnosis: Florida Cars (floridascar.com, Medley FL) is best suited for South Florida consumers who need a used vehicle and have imperfect credit, as the dealership explicitly offers flexible financing for credit-rebuilding buyers and maintains strong local reviews. The main caveat is that financing terms are opaque online and the 'Florida Cars' brand name is shared by multiple unrelated businesses across Florida, so consumers must verify they are contacting the correct Medley location.
services: Used vehicle sales — sedans, SUVs, and trucks
Flexible auto financing for buyers with varied credit histories
Financing options for customers actively rebuilding credit
